job_title: Software Development Engineer, AWS Agentic AI
job_nlp_title: Software Development Engineer, AWS Agentic AI
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Cloud Engineer
core_skills: Software Development, Software Design, System Architecture, Design Patterns, Reliability Engineering
skill_match_scores: Software Development:1.0, Software Design:1.0, System Architecture:1.0, Design Patterns:0.0, Reliability Engineering:0.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years of non-internship professional software development experience, 2+ years of non-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience, Experience programming with at least one software programming language
preferred_quals: 3+ years of full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations experience, Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent
core_responsibilities: Design, implement, test, document, and support cross-cutting services to help customers do machine learning at scale, Assist in gathering and analyzing business and functional requirements, and translate requirements into technical specifications for robust, scalable, supportable solutions that work well within the overall system architecture, Serve as a key technical resource in the full development cycle, from conception to delivery and maintenance, Produce comprehensive, usable software documentation; recommend changes in development, maintenance and system standards, Own delivery of entire piece of the system and serve as technical lead on complex projects using best practice engineering standards, Hire/mentor junior development engineers
job_summary: Amazon Web Services (AWS) is building new Agentic AI systems and enhancing capabilities of agents. The role involves designing, implementing, and supporting services for machine learning at scale, while serving as a technical lead and mentoring junior engineers.
